title: TradingBot
author: TRADINGWORLDISTOXIC
selftext: So, we have been developing a trading bot that doesn't remove the trader but instead they become one to create something truly amazing. If you are interested in the bot tell me in comments. In order to get informed abou the bot, you will do a free online meeting to learn how the bot works, how to us it, see backtests and the bot running live too!
